summary: An OAN 'Real America with Dan Ball' interview segment with CBP Acting Deputy Commissioner Ron Vitiello speaking about California sanctuary policies, set against the network's seal backdrop with chyrons and a news ticker. The footage is a single talking-head shot.
notable_text: OAN; REAL AMERICA with Dan Ball; 'TOM STEYER PLEDGES TO OPEN BORDERS & ARREST ICE AGENTS'; tweet references Acting Deputy Commissioner Ron Vitiello on sanctuary policies
